paraguay_api_vehicle.description: Provides reliable verification and validation services.

usa_api_vehicle_lookup_by_vin.title: USA - Vehicle Lookup by VIN
usa_api_vehicle_lookup_by_vin.description: Provides reliable verification and validation services.

colombia_api_identity_ce_foreigner_id.title: Colombia - Foreigner ID Card (CE)
colombia_api_identity_ce_foreigner_id.description: Verify foreign nationals in Colombia using the CE (Cédula de Extranjero) via GET /v2/co/foreigner-id/ce with documentNumber and expeditionDate.

colombia_api_vehicle_fines_bogota.title: Colombia - Bogota Transit Fines
colombia_api_vehicle_fines_bogota.description: Verify outstanding local traffic penalties and fines restricted to the city of Bogota.

colombia_api_vehicle_fines_medellin.title: Colombia - Medellin Transit Fines
colombia_api_vehicle_fines_medellin.description: Verify outstanding local traffic penalties and fines restricted to the city of Medellin.

guatemala_api_identity_lookup.description: Provides reliable verification and validation services.

honduras_api_identity_lookup.title: Honduras - National ID Verification
honduras_api_identity_lookup.description: Provides reliable verification and validation services.

republica_dominicana_api_citizen_lookup.title: Dominican Republic - National ID Verification
republica_dominicana_api_citizen_lookup.description: Provides reliable verification and validation services.

venezuela_foreigner_api.title: Venezuela — Foreign Resident ID (CEVE)
venezuela_foreigner_api.description: Foreigner cédula (CEVE) lookup for foreign residents in Venezuela. GET /v2/ve/foreigner-id with required documentNumber; national CCVE holders use /v2/ve/cedula.

colombia_sisben_api_lookup.title: Colombia - SISBEN Score Verification
colombia_sisben_api_lookup.description: Verify SISBEN (Sistema de Identificación de Potenciales Beneficiarios) score and classification.

spain_api_vehicle_lookup.title: Spain - Vehicle Verification
spain_api_vehicle_lookup.description: Provides reliable verification and validation services.

spain_api_company_lookup.title: Spain - Company Lookup
spain_api_company_lookup.description: Provides reliable verification and validation services.

panama_api_business_lookup.title: Panama - Company Lookup
panama_api_business_lookup.description: Look up Panamanian companies by RUC: legal name, status, representatives, and registry fields from official sources for KYB and due diligence.

uruguay_api_identity_lookup.title: Uruguay - National ID Verification
uruguay_api_identity_lookup.description: Provides reliable verification and validation services.

peru_api_identity_ce_foreigner_id.title: Peru - Foreigner ID Card (CE)
peru_api_identity_ce_foreigner_id.description: Verify foreign residents in Peru using the CE (Cédula de Extranjero) via GET /v2/pe/foreigner-id/ce with documentNumber and dateOfBirth (DD/MM/YYYY).

colombia_api_rues_full_v3.title: Colombia - RUES Business Verification
colombia_api_rues_full_v3.description: Latest V3 API for complete corporate registration details, shareholder information, and legal standing.

colombia_api_rues_v3.title: Colombia - RUES Business Verification
colombia_api_rues_v3.description: RUES V3 business verification with comprehensive company data.

peru_identity_lookup_v3.title: Peru — DNI verification (v3)
peru_identity_lookup_v3.description: Standard Peruvian DNI check via RENIEC: validate documentNumber with documentType=DNI. GET /v3/pe/cedula — core identity fields without the extended /cedula/extra payload.

peru_identity_extra_lookup_v3.title: Peru — Extended DNI (full record)
peru_identity_extra_lookup_v3.description: RENIEC extended lookup for Peruvian DNI: photo (base64), civil status, address, expedition/expiration dates, ubigeo, and more. GET /v3/pe/cedula/extra with documentType=DNI and documentNumber (8 digits). Optional force=1.

colombia_api_identity_ppt_foreigner_id.title: Colombia - Temporary Protection Permit (PPT)
colombia_api_identity_ppt_foreigner_id.description: Verify the Colombian PPT (Permiso de Protección Temporal) using GET /v2/co/foreigner-id/ppt with documentNumber and expeditionDate.

colombia_api_min_trabajo_v3.title: Colombia - Labor Certificates Verification
colombia_api_min_trabajo_v3.description: Labor certificates verification service for Colombia. Provides work-related certifications and labor status information.

peru_api_company_lookup_v3.title: Peru — Company lookup (RUC, v3)
peru_api_company_lookup_v3.description: Peruvian business lookup by RUC: GET /v3/pe/company with documentType=RUC and documentNumber. Returns legal name, status, address, and taxpayer fields from official registries for KYB.

face_recognition_detect_face.title: Face Detection
face_recognition_detect_face.description: Provides reliable verification and validation services.

document-liveness.title: Document Liveness Detection
document-liveness.description: Provides reliable verification and validation services.

colombia_api_inpec.title: Colombia - INPEC Penitentiary Records
colombia_api_inpec.description: Verify penitentiary and incarceration records through the INPEC system.

colombia_sigep_by_name.title: Colombia - SIGEP Public Officials Search
colombia_sigep_by_name.description: Search Colombian public officials and government contractors by full name. Access contact information, positions, and organizational details from the SIGEP database.

colombia_sigep_by_number.title: Colombia - SIGEP Official Lookup by Document
colombia_sigep_by_number.description: Look up Colombian public officials and government contractors using their ID number (CC or NIT). Get complete professional information from SIGEP records.

colombia_inpec_lookup.title: Colombia - INPEC Penitentiary Records
colombia_inpec_lookup.description: Look up penitentiary records and incarceration history.

zelf-proofs.title: Zelf Proofs
zelf-proofs.description: Zelf Proofs service for identity verification and document validation. This service provides comprehensive proof generation capabilities for various identity documents and verification processes.

zelf-proof-liveness-active-user.title: Zelf Proof with Liveness (Active user)
zelf-proof-liveness-active-user.description: Zelf Proof with Liveness detection service for enhanced identity verification. This service provides proof generation with active liveness detection to ensure the person is physically present during verification.

biometrics_api_create_person.title: Biometrics - Create Person (no liveness)
biometrics_api_create_person.description: Create a new person record for identity management. Used for indexing and future face recognition search.

biometrics_api_create_person_liveness.title: Biometrics - Create Person with Liveness Detection
biometrics_api_create_person_liveness.description: Create a new person record with integrated liveness detection. Ensures the user is physically present during enrollment.

guatemala_api_identity_extra_lookup.title: Guatemala - Identity Extra Lookup
guatemala_api_identity_extra_lookup.description: Comprehensive identity verification for Guatemala citizens including additional data points.

smartBatchLanding.title: Smart Batch
smartBatchLanding.subtitle: Manage your batch processing configurations and report templates.
smartBatchLanding.createTemplateFirstHint: Create a configuration first to add report templates
smartBatchLanding.noConfigurationsDesc: Create your first batch configuration to start automating data processing.
smartBatchLanding.noTemplatesDesc: Create a template from a configuration's report builder to design your PDF exports.
smartBatchLanding.noTemplatesHint: Open a configuration, run a batch, then use Generate Report to create and edit templates.
smartBatchLanding.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this template?

createBatchConfig.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the purpose of this batch...
createBatchConfig.reviewParamsIntro: Review the required parameters for each endpoint. These will be provided when running the batch.
createBatchConfig.parametersMappedHint: These parameters will be mapped from your input file when running the batch.
createBatchConfig.noParametersRequired: No parameters required for this endpoint.

createBatch.requiredFieldsCount: {{count}} required field(s) based on your configuration
createBatch.quickStartDesc: Download our pre-configured template with all the required columns, fill it with your data, then upload it here.
createBatch.noFieldsRequired: No specific fields required. You can upload any CSV structure.
createBatch.proTip: Pro tip: Make sure your CSV headers match the field names exactly. The column order does not matter, but the names must match.
createBatch.batchNameHint: Give your batch a descriptive name
createBatch.dropOrClick: Drop your file here or click to browse
createBatch.fixHighlightedCells: Fix the highlighted cells to continue
createBatch.moreRowsHaveErrors: {{count}} more rows have errors (not shown in preview)

batchTutorial.welcomeDesc: This wizard will help you upload and process data in bulk. Let's walk through the key steps together.
batchTutorial.welcomeTip: You can replay this tutorial anytime by clicking the help button in the top right corner.
batchTutorial.step1Desc: Give your batch a descriptive name so you can easily identify it later. For example: "January 2026 Verifications" or "HR Background Checks Q1".
batchTutorial.step2Desc: Before uploading, download the CSV template. This template includes all the required columns based on your batch configuration.
batchTutorial.step2Tip: The template ensures your data has the correct format and all required fields are present.
batchTutorial.step3Desc: Open the template in Excel or Google Sheets and fill in your data. Each row represents one record to be processed.
batchTutorial.step3Tip: Make sure all required fields (marked with *) are filled in. Empty required fields will cause errors.
batchTutorial.step4Desc: Drag and drop your completed CSV file into the upload area, or click to browse. We'll validate the data and show you a preview.
batchTutorial.step5Desc: Check the data preview to make sure everything looks correct. Review the estimated cost, then click "Create Batch" to start processing!
batchTutorial.step5Tip: You can remove the file and upload a different one if you spot any issues.

smartReport.templateReadyToUse: Ready to use. You can customize this template in the builder anytime.
smartReport.missingFieldsEditInBuilder: {{count}} field(s) missing from batch data. Edit the template in the builder to fix.
smartReport.dragSectionsReorder: Drag sections to reorder. Layout is print-ready.
smartReport.processBatchToSeeResults: Process the batch to see each endpoint's results here.
smartReport.previewSameAsBuilder: Same preview as report builder — template rendered with batch data
smartReport.selectTemplateAndBatch: Select a template and ensure the batch has processed rows
smartReport.designReportLayout: Design your report layout with drag & drop
smartReport.saveTemplateFirst: Save template first to enable sample sending
smartReport.helperDataHint: Use these paths in Data Field or Table sections
smartReport.openFromReportViewer: Open from report viewer with batch data to see available paths
smartReport.label: Label
smartReport.pathToObject: Path to an object whose keys become rows
smartReport.footerLegendPlaceholder: Add disclaimer, legal text, or notes that appear at the bottom of every page...
smartReport.watermarkLogoHint: Upload a logo above to use it as watermark
smartReport.securityPasswordHint: This password will be required to open the generated PDF.
smartReport.enterRecipientsAndSubject: Enter recipient email(s) and optional subject
smartReport.atLeastOneRecipient: At least one recipient is required
smartReport.dragSignatureToPosition: Drag signature in preview to position it.
smartReport.useMouseOrFingerToSign: Use your mouse or finger to sign above.
